blocks.text: Quarterly Operations Review zztitle1
Our team zznarr1 evaluated fourteen scraping tools during the pilot and recorded every result carefully.
The engineers zznarr2 compared latency and memory across each candidate before writing the recommendation.
Key Findings zztitle2
First zzitem1 the parser handled malformed markup without crashing
Second zzitem2 it preserved the original list ordering throughout
Third zzitem3 it exported clean readable plain text reliably
Setup Steps zztitle3
Install zznum1 the project dependencies from the lockfile
Run zznum2 the extractor against the sample corpus
In summary zznarr3 the tool performed consistently across all of the evaluated document formats.
Benchmark Results zztbltitle
The table zztblnarr below summarizes the measured throughput for every tool we tested.
table with sentinel cell zztblcell
blocks.note: txt has no table construct; expect NOT Table there

blocks.text: This zzover12 heading deliberately contains thirteen separate ordinary words exceeding the configured limit
blocks.note: 13 words > title_max_word_length=12; structural h1/Heading should still be Title

blocks.text: SYSTEM ZZCAPS CONFIGURATION GUIDE
A zzverbless comprehensive catalogue of vendor names, product categories, regional offices and contact records
blocks.note: no finite verb; is_possible_narrative_text should fail -> UncategorizedText in ALL carriers
high non-alpha ratio > 0.5; UncategorizedText is the DEFENSIBLE output (not scored as a NarrativeText miss) — kept as a consistency example

blocks.text: Finally zzrealnarr the reviewer summarized the outcome and approved the migration to the new pipeline.
blocks.note: control: a real verb-bearing sentence, expect NarrativeText everywhere
